## Aliyun ROS BASTIONHOST Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as BASTIONHOST from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-bastionhost';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.Host

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.Host.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.Host.attr_host_id
documentation: Attribute HostId: The ID of the host that was created.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::BastionHost::Host`, which is used to create a host for O&M in a bastion host.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosHost\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-bastionhost-host>

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.HostProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Host`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-bastionhost-host>

```
param active_address_type

Property activeAddressType: The endpoint type of the host that you want to create. Valid values: Public: a public endpoint Private: an internal endpoint

param host_name

Property hostName: The name of the host that you want to create. The name can be up to 128 characters in length.

param instance_id

Property instanceId: The ID of the Bastionhost instance where you want to create the host. Note: You can call the DescribeInstances operation to query the ID of the Bastionhost instance.

param os_type

Property osType: The operating system of the host that you want to create. Valid values: - Linux - Windows

param source

Property source: The source of the host that you want to create. Valid values: - Local: an on-premises host - Ecs: an Elastic Compute Service (ECS) instance - Rds: a host in a dedicated cluster

param comment

Property comment: The description of the host that you want to create. The value can be up to 500 characters.

param host_private_address

Property hostPrivateAddress: The internal endpoint of the host that you want to create. You can set this parameter to a domain name or an IP address. Note: This parameter is required if the ActiveAddressType parameter is set to Private.

param host_public_address

Property hostPublicAddress: The public endpoint of the host that you want to create. You can set this parameter to a domain name or an IP address. Note: This parameter is required if the ActiveAddressType parameter is set to Public.

param instance_region_id

Property instanceRegionId: The ID of the region where the ECS instance or dedicated cluster host that you want to create resides. Note: This parameter is required if the Source parameter is set to Ecs or Rds.

param source_instance_id

Property sourceInstanceId: The ID of the ECS instance or dedicated cluster host that you want to create. Note This parameter is required if the Source parameter is set to Ecs or Rds.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.HostProps.active_address_type
documentation:
Property activeAddressType: The endpoint type of the host that you want to create.

Valid values:
Public: a public endpoint
Private: an internal endpoint

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.HostProps.host_name
documentation:
Property hostName: The name of the host that you want to create.

The name can be up to 128 characters in length.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.HostProps.instance_id
documentation:
Property instanceId: The ID of the Bastionhost instance where you want to create the host.

Note: You can call the DescribeInstances operation to query the ID of the Bastionhost instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.HostProps.os_type
documentation:
Property osType: The operating system of the host that you want to create.

Valid values:

- Linux
- Windows

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.HostProps.source
documentation:
Property source: The source of the host that you want to create.

Valid values:

- Local: an on-premises host
- Ecs: an Elastic Compute Service (ECS) instance
- Rds: a host in a dedicated cluster

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.HostProps.comment
documentation:
Property comment: The description of the host that you want to create.

The value can be up to 500 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.HostProps.host_private_address
documentation:
Property hostPrivateAddress: The internal endpoint of the host that you want to create.

You can set this parameter to a domain name or an IP address.
Note: This parameter is required if the ActiveAddressType parameter is set to Private.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.HostProps.host_public_address
documentation:
Property hostPublicAddress: The public endpoint of the host that you want to create.

You can set this parameter to a domain name or an IP address.
Note: This parameter is required if the ActiveAddressType parameter is set to Public.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.HostProps.instance_region_id
documentation:
Property instanceRegionId: The ID of the region where the ECS instance or dedicated cluster host that you want to create resides.

Note: This parameter is required if the Source parameter is set to Ecs or Rds.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.HostProps.source_instance_id
documentation:
Property sourceInstanceId: The ID of the ECS instance or dedicated cluster host that you want to create.

Note This parameter is required if the Source parameter is set to Ecs or Rds.

classes.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.Instance

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.Instance.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.Instance.attr_instance_id
documentation: Attribute InstanceId: Instance Id.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::BastionHost::Instance`, which is used to create a bastion host.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosInstance\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-bastionhost-instance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.InstanceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Instance`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-bastionhost-instance>

```
param extended_storage_plans

Property extendedStoragePlans: If the default storage capacity is insufficient, you can purchase extended storage plans.Unit: TB.

param extra_bandwidth

Property extraBandwidth: Additional bandwidth is added to the default settings to ensure efficient O&M.Unit: Mbps.

param plan

Property plan: The number of asset authorization and concurrency limit.Unit: Asset number.

param start_instance_param

Property startInstanceParam: Parameters required to start a bastion host instance.

param version

Property version: Enterprise version:- Deployment instructions: dual-engine architecture, supports multiple availability zones, and ensures high stability - Operation and maintenance scenarios: unified operation and maintenance of assets on Alibaba Cloud, offline IDC servers, and third-party clouds - Asset type: Linux/Windows, database assets - User management: RAM, AD/LDAP and local users - Control strategy: fine-grained strategic control such as operation and maintenance approval, high-risk command blocking, etc. - Operation and maintenance audit: full traceability of operation and maintenance log audit and video audit Value-added capabilities: automatic password change of Linux assets, database operation and maintenance management and control, convenient operation and maintenance of Web and client, network domain agent hybrid cloud scenario operation and maintenance mode, etc.Basic version:- Deployment instructions: The basic version is deployed on a single machine and does not support multiple availability zones. - Operation and maintenance scenarios: unified operation and maintenance of assets on Alibaba Cloud, offline IDC servers, and third-party clouds - Asset type: Linux/Windows assets - User management: RAM, AD/LDAP and local users - Control strategy: Operation and maintenance approval, high-risk command blocking and other strategic management and control - Operation and maintenance audit: full traceability of operation and maintenance log audit and video audit

param auto_pay

Property autoPay: Whether to auto pay the bill.

param auto_renew

Property autoRenew: Whether to auto renew the prepay instance. The auto-renewal period is Monthly.After you enable auto-renewal, the system deducts the renewal fee nine days before the resource expires.If the payment fails, the system does not stop deducting the fee until the deduction is successful or one day before the resource expires.

param period

Property period: The subscription period of the bastionhost instanceIf PeriodUnit is month, the valid range is 1, 3, 6 If periodUnit is year, the valid range is 1, 2, 3.

param period_unit

Property periodUnit: The unit of the subscription duration. Valid values: Month Year Default value: Month.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: Resource group ID.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.InstanceProps.extended_storage_plans
documentation: Property extendedStoragePlans: If the default storage capacity is insufficient, you can purchase extended storage plans.Unit: TB.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.InstanceProps.extra_bandwidth
documentation: Property extraBandwidth: Additional bandwidth is added to the default settings to ensure efficient O&M.Unit: Mbps.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.InstanceProps.plan
documentation: Property plan: The number of asset authorization and concurrency limit.Unit: Asset number.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.InstanceProps.start_instance_param
documentation: Property startInstanceParam: Parameters required to start a bastion host instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.InstanceProps.version
documentation:
Property version: Enterprise version:- Deployment instructions: dual-engine architecture, supports multiple availability zones, and ensures high stability - Operation and maintenance scenarios: unified operation and maintenance of assets on Alibaba Cloud, offline IDC servers, and third-party clouds - Asset type: Linux/Windows, database assets - User management: RAM, AD/LDAP and local users - Control strategy: fine-grained strategic control such as operation and maintenance approval, high-risk command blocking, etc.

- Operation and maintenance audit: full traceability of operation and maintenance log audit and video audit
  Value-added capabilities: automatic password change of Linux assets, database operation and maintenance management and control, convenient operation and maintenance of Web and client, network domain agent hybrid cloud scenario operation and maintenance mode, etc.Basic version:- Deployment instructions: The basic version is deployed on a single machine and does not support multiple availability zones.
- Operation and maintenance scenarios: unified operation and maintenance of assets on Alibaba Cloud, offline IDC servers, and third-party clouds
- Asset type: Linux/Windows assets
- User management: RAM, AD/LDAP and local users
- Control strategy: Operation and maintenance approval, high-risk command blocking and other strategic management and control
- Operation and maintenance audit: full traceability of operation and maintenance log audit and video audit

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.InstanceProps.auto_pay
documentation: Property autoPay: Whether to auto pay the bill.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.InstanceProps.auto_renew
documentation:
Property autoRenew: Whether to auto renew the prepay instance.

The auto-renewal period is Monthly.After you enable auto-renewal, the system deducts the renewal fee nine days before the resource expires.If the payment fails, the system does not stop deducting the fee until the deduction is successful or one day before the resource expires.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.InstanceProps.period
documentation: Property period: The subscription period of the bastionhost instanceIf PeriodUnit is month, the valid range is 1, 3, 6 If periodUnit is year, the valid range is 1, 2, 3.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.InstanceProps.period_unit
documentation:
Property periodUnit: The unit of the subscription duration.

Valid values:
Month
Year
Default value: Month.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.InstanceProps.resource_group_id
documentation: Property resourceGroupId: Resource group ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosHost.active_address_type
documentation:
:Property:

activeAddressType: The endpoint type of the host that you want to create. Valid values:
Public: a public endpoint
Private: an internal endpoint

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosHost.host_name
documentation: :Property: hostName: The name of the host that you want to create. The name can be up to 128 characters in length.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosHost.instance_id
documentation:
:Property:

instanceId: The ID of the Bastionhost instance where you want to create the host.
Note: You can call the DescribeInstances operation to query the ID of the Bastionhost instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosHost.os_type
documentation:
:Property:

osType: The operating system of the host that you want to create. Valid values:

- Linux
- Windows

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosHost.source
documentation:
:Property:

source: The source of the host that you want to create. Valid values:

- Local: an on-premises host
- Ecs: an Elastic Compute Service (ECS) instance
- Rds: a host in a dedicated cluster

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosHost.comment
documentation: :Property: comment: The description of the host that you want to create. The value can be up to 500 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosHost.host_private_address
documentation:
:Property:

hostPrivateAddress: The internal endpoint of the host that you want to create. You can set this parameter to a domain name or an IP address.
Note: This parameter is required if the ActiveAddressType parameter is set to Private.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosHost.host_public_address
documentation:
:Property:

hostPublicAddress: The public endpoint of the host that you want to create. You can set this parameter to a domain name or an IP address.
Note: This parameter is required if the ActiveAddressType parameter is set to Public.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosHost.instance_region_id
documentation:
:Property:

instanceRegionId: The ID of the region where the ECS instance or dedicated cluster host that you want to create resides.
Note: This parameter is required if the Source parameter is set to Ecs or Rds.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosHost.source_instance_id
documentation:
:Property:

sourceInstanceId: The ID of the ECS instance or dedicated cluster host that you want to create.
Note This parameter is required if the Source parameter is set to Ecs or Rds.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::BastionHost::Host`, which is used to create a host for O&M in a bastion host.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Host` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-bastionhost-host>

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.attr_instance_id
documentation: :Attribute: InstanceId: Instance Id.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.extended_storage_plans
documentation: :Property: extendedStoragePlans: If the default storage capacity is insufficient, you can purchase extended storage plans.Unit: TB

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.extra_bandwidth
documentation: :Property: extraBandwidth: Additional bandwidth is added to the default settings to ensure efficient O&M.Unit: Mbps

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.plan
documentation: :Property: plan: The number of asset authorization and concurrency limit.Unit: Asset number

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.start_instance_param
documentation: :Property: startInstanceParam: Parameters required to start a bastion host instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.version
documentation:
:Property:

version: Enterprise version:- Deployment instructions: dual-engine architecture, supports multiple availability zones, and ensures high stability

- Operation and maintenance scenarios: unified operation and maintenance of assets on Alibaba Cloud, offline IDC servers, and third-party clouds
- Asset type: Linux/Windows, database assets
- User management: RAM, AD/LDAP and local users
- Control strategy: fine-grained strategic control such as operation and maintenance approval, high-risk command blocking, etc.
- Operation and maintenance audit: full traceability of operation and maintenance log audit and video audit
Value-added capabilities: automatic password change of Linux assets, database operation and maintenance management and control, convenient operation and maintenance of Web and client, network domain agent hybrid cloud scenario operation and maintenance mode, etc.Basic version:- Deployment instructions: The basic version is deployed on a single machine and does not support multiple availability zones.
- Operation and maintenance scenarios: unified operation and maintenance of assets on Alibaba Cloud, offline IDC servers, and third-party clouds
- Asset type: Linux/Windows assets
- User management: RAM, AD/LDAP and local users
- Control strategy: Operation and maintenance approval, high-risk command blocking and other strategic management and control
- Operation and maintenance audit: full traceability of operation and maintenance log audit and video audit

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.auto_pay
documentation: :Property: autoPay: Whether to auto pay the bill.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.auto_renew
documentation: :Property: autoRenew: Whether to auto renew the prepay instance. The auto-renewal period is Monthly.After you enable auto-renewal, the system deducts the renewal fee nine days before the resource expires.If the payment fails, the system does not stop deducting the fee until the deduction is successful or one day before the resource expires.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.period
documentation:
:Property:

period: The subscription period of the bastionhost instanceIf PeriodUnit is month, the valid range is 1, 3, 6
If periodUnit is year, the valid range is 1, 2, 3

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.period_unit
documentation:
:Property:

periodUnit: The unit of the subscription duration. Valid values:
Month
Year
Default value: Month.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: Resource group ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.StartInstanceParamProperty.security_group_ids
documentation: :Property: securityGroupIds: List of security group IDs bound to the bastion host instance

methods.name: ros_cdk_bastionhost.RosInstance.StartInstanceParamProperty.vswitch_id
documentation: :Property: vswitchId: The VSwitch ID bound to the bastion host instance.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::BastionHost::Instance`, which is used to create a bastion host.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Instance` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-bastionhost-instance>
